_meta.notes: SEED ONLY - not yet generated against the live DB. Contains a single verifiably-public entry so the Nexus /journeys ingestion contract can be validated. To populate the full ~188-member list with real timelines, run `npx tsx scripts/generate-members.ts` with SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in the environment (server-side only, never in the browser). The generator derives real milestones from respect_members (Onchain OG, respect tiers, fractal sessions). Do not hand-add third-party members here - that is consent-gated PII (see .claude/rules/pii-hygiene.md).

milestones.title: Founded The ZAO
milestones.detail: Decentralized music label and community on Base.
